Q1.description: Fixed TaskRecord::from_task() to preserve scoring_data. Commit: 0e2ac3e

Q2.name: Design & Planning
Q2.description: Completed GAIA/SWE-bench standard verification design. Docs: STANDARD_BENCHMARK_DESIGN.md + phase-q2-standard-benchmark.md

G1.name: Docker Standard Images
G1.description: 6 Docker images built + verified. Git config added. Commit: 62a27b0

G2.name: GAIA Standardization
G2.description: T5-T7 done. T8 GAIA baseline complete: R1 (DDG) 18.3% avg, R2 (Tavily) 32.5% avg. Best: MiniMax-M2.1 43.3%. Run IDs: 2026-03-17-008 (R1), 2026-03-17-009 (R2).

G3.name: SWE-bench Standardization
G3.description: T9-T12 infrastructure + T13 baseline complete. Full harness verification via swebench 4.1.0 Docker. 4 models x 30 tasks, 3.3% resolved (astropy-14995 only). 87% patch apply failures. Run ID: 2026-03-17-007.

G4.name: Config & Baseline Report
G4.description: T14 benchmark.toml unified. T15 standard benchmark report written: docs/design/EVAL_STANDARD_BENCHMARK_REPORT.md — includes GAIA deep analysis (per-model profiles, tool usage patterns, failure taxonomy) and dataset filtering strategy.

phase_name: Phase Q — GAIA & SWE-bench Standard Testing
notes: Phase Q 15/15 tasks COMPLETE. Key results: SWE-bench 3.3% (harness verified, 4 models identical), GAIA DDG 18.3% → Tavily 32.5% (+77%). Deep analysis: 13/30 GAIA tasks in agent blind spot (OCR/video/precision calc). Dataset filtering strategy defined: exclude .png/.jpg/.mp3/video tasks → 165→139 effective tasks. Report: docs/design/EVAL_STANDARD_BENCHMARK_REPORT.md. Runs: 007 (SWE-bench), 008 (GAIA-DDG), 009 (GAIA-Tavily).
